HTML file for visualizing power profiling data using Dygraph with a CSV input.

# Purpose
The HTML document integrates a Dygraph chart into a webpage. It includes a style section that defines the appearance of highlighted elements within the graph legend. The script section loads the Dygraph library from `dygraph-combined.js` and initializes a Dygraph object, `g2`, which displays data from a CSV file named `profile.csv`. The graph is configured to be a stacked graph with specific visual properties, such as a highlight circle size and stroke width, to enhance the display of highlighted series. The graph is rendered within a `div` element with the ID `graphdiv2`, which is set to a width of 1000 pixels and a height of 800 pixels.
